title: ixeris repens
intro: Ixeris repens, also known as creeping wormwood or creeping thistle, is a perennial plant native to Asia and parts of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, which can help to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of Ixeris repens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Ixeris repens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
